heading: Omitted
label: 687 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which authorized a $100 payment to each member of the Red Lake Band of Chippewa Indians of Minnesota alive on , from proceeds of the sale of timber and lumber within the Red Lake Reservation, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub.
